1: Thou hast enlarged me when I was when I was in distress; Have mercy upon me, and hear my prayer.
2: How long How long will ye love vanity, and and seek after leasing? Selah. Selah.
3: The LORD LORD will hear when I call unto him.
4: Commune with your own heart upon your bed, and be still. Selah. Selah.
5: And put your trust in the LORD LORD .
6: The light of thy countenance upon us.
7: More than in the time that that their corn and their wine increased.
8: For thou, LORD LORD , only makest me dwell in safety.
